title: store.rs list_group_members has no cap — unbounded result set on large groups
description: relay/src/store.rs list_group_members() does SELECT pub_id FROM group_members WHERE group_id = ?1 with no LIMIT. add_group_member_capped enforces a cap at write time, but if the cap was changed or the DB was manipulated, a single list_group_members call can return an unbounded Vec<String>. The GROUP_LEAVE handler calls list_group_members and forwards the result to the relay wire response. A group with 10K members produces a 10K-element JSON array in a single response. Should add LIMIT matching the add_member cap.
